title: Scenario 03 Claim Consumption Event

consumed_claim.statement: The memo was produced and reviewed for preliminary vendor-risk triage only.

attempted_consumption.attempted_claim: Vendor is approved / cleared for onboarding.

classification.reason: The downstream onboarding approval / cleared label exceeds the recorded preliminary triage scope and lacks new approval authority, new evidence, or an explicit downstream decision record.

required_next_action: Treat downstream approval / cleared label as unsupported unless separately authorized.
Request explicit approval authority and evidence before operational onboarding action.
